Rapacious Subvention  

Description

2: Increase Mana by 60

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 200 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 3 Recast Time: 8
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 200
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Target Type: Single Spell Type: Beneficial
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Other cast: Soandso concentrates.
Cast on you: A foreign surge of mana refreshes your mind.
Cast on other: Soandso twitches.

Game Description

Restores your target's mana at the expense of your own.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Rapacious Subvention

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Rapacious Subvention
ClassLevel
NEC21
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (20)
  • Sold By (9)
  • Screenshots
Post Comment
Neat Use
QuoteReply
# Jan 09 2006 at 3:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591863751171
877 posts
I started a Chanter on a new server. While in PoK, a Necro asked me to Enchant 10 stacks of silver for him. At level 32 at the time, my mana pool was roughly 1200. Mass Enchant Silver costs 120 mana, enchanting 5 a pop. That's 40 castings, so 40*120 mana.. coming to 4800 mana. Four times my mana pool. So, he switched to a Lich form and started casting this on me. With my own C1 (9mana/tick) on me, we managed to enchant them all by the time he was at 8%HP. Good thing, too. He told me its possible for a Necro to die from life loss in that form.. made me pretty nervous. Nice guy, though.. even paid me 3k when he had offered 2k, which was still generous, to begin with. Helps a lot, especially when you're new to a server!
▲ Page top
Ignorance is bliss.
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2005 at 12:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591847149776
15 posts
Quote:
no, because your (or the cleric's) 10m spell isn't nearly as good as whatever the cleric could cast with 60m


for 10 mana I heal 80 per tick for a BUNCH of ticks. You find me ANY caster that can match the ability of a Necro to heal for the cost of the mana and we can talk.

Point being. OOM Clerics are BAD clerics. Or you got a Bad Puller.

This spell is awesome for the "Raid Buffing" when your Shammies and Clerics are casting high mana buffs and have not bothered to get MGB yet. Then you do this as you are just sitting around anyway.

Now then MAGES have the guts to ask for a tiwtch. They shoudl be killed. I out DPS them, I out Heal them, and My pet is just as good. Manage your own mana. I often do not even bother to keep this up except during the pre raid buff periods.
▲ Page top
Ignorance is bliss.
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2006 at 6:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592763330025
47 posts
I play both a 70 necro and a 70 mage, so I understand your pride in being a necro. I will assume that this pride is what led to the statement that you out-dps mages and your pet is just as good, because neither are based in fact. The mage air pet will hold aggro during the entire battle when I am soloing, the necro pet will not. The mage pet requires fewer heals per battle. Considering all the damage that is done by both pets, the mage pet has an edge in dps as well. When fighting the same mob I get way faster kills with my mage than I do with my necro. They have about the same AA's and the same level of gear, so I'm gonna say that the mage is more dps based on faster kills. I also have a 66 wizzy who can kill the same mob even quicker than the mage or necro. I have never had the chance or ability to solo mobs with huge amounts of hit points that might eventually drain the mana pool of any of my toons, so I can't argue the point that most necro's make about being the better dps in the long run.
▲ Page top
Ignorance is bliss.
QuoteReply
# Aug 30 2006 at 7:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257070151
5 posts
Actually, up to a certain point KREWELL is right, mages will out DPS a necro.

The thing is that necros require longer fights for their DPS to get higher and more efficient. A necro can chain pull and do (just a number) 100 DPS, the mage can do 4 mobs then med a few but does 150 DPS.

It's almost the same comparison between mages and wizards, where the mages take longer then the wizards.

All three do about the same DPS throughout the game
▲ Page top

i have a idea how about everyone quit crying over spells or play a different class

# Oct 11 2004 at 1:04 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593362923560
12 posts
this is the first spell of the twitch line. They are one of the necro's main attributes! Your group/raid will want you to use this, so make sure to buy this spell!

a little unclear
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2003 at 5:44 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591789153906
10 posts
so, does it cost 200 mana to cast and then gives the 60 mana so you lose a total of 260 mana? or does it cost 140 mana to cast and then gives the 60 mana making a your mana pool a total of 200 less?
▲ Page top
RE: a little unclear
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2003 at 7:04 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591773923886
7 posts
It costs you 200 mana and gives a target player 60 mana.

Takes 200 mana from you and gives your target 50 mana. Good if cleric is oom in a fight.

▲ Page top
RE: I hate Allakhazam's Explainations
QuoteReply
# Feb 04 2005 at 10:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591823725151
16 posts
this is also a good spell when in a duo with another necro. one of your plays pet healer and mezzer while the other dots. the dotter will run out of mana first so the healer slaps your with some mana.

this is also great in a group/red whith bad pulls, slapping the wizard another nuke or 2 with your extra mana might help. what about a druid with no mana for an evac when a new spawn on a med break?

ever seen a necro power level a mage? would you not use this?

anyhow, i have found it very useful other than giving cleric mana but if you want to be a mana bank for cleric go for it.

some people will take advantage of this so be careful it could end up killing you.... good luck
▲ Page top
RE: I hate Allakhazam's Explainations
QuoteReply
# Dec 27 2004 at 7:25 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591802929480
38 posts
for the cleric, for the druid and any other class that needs mana, a necro is a battery
